description: Style NoteA relaxed pink top that's easily styled and very trendy, this one from vero moda is a definite winner. We love this Danish brand's feminine charm, wear this top with jeans or denim shorts for a sweet casual look. Product DetailsPink woven top, has a round neckline with a drawstring tie detail, three quarter raglan sleeves with elasticated cuffs, pin tucks with lace detail on either side in front and elasticated smocking at the hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dry Use cool ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
